requirement_topic.en: EMC Conformity for Grid-Connected Inverters in Uzbekistan
requirement_topic.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦并网逆变器电磁兼容符合性
requirement_topic.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦併網逆變器電磁相容符合性

summary.en: PV inverters with electronic power-conversion circuits and grid interfaces may require EMC conformity evidence under Uzbekistan O'z DSt / GOST EMC standards as part of O'zstandart conformity certification. Relevant O'z DSt or GOST standards are often derived from IEC 61000 / CISPR series. The technical file should address emissions, immunity, installation conditions, cabling, filters, and operating modes relevant to grid-connected inverter use.
summary.zh: 带有电子功率变换电路和电网接口的光伏逆变器作为O'zstandart符合性认证的一部分，可能需要依据乌兹别克斯坦O'z DSt/GOST电磁兼容标准提供EMC符合性证据。相关O'z DSt或GOST标准通常派生自IEC 61000/CISPR系列。技术文件应覆盖与并网逆变器使用相关的发射、抗扰度、安装条件、布线、滤波器和运行模式。
summary.zht: 帶有電子功率變換電路和電網介面的光伏逆變器作為O'zstandart符合性認證的一部分，可能需要依據烏茲別克斯坦O'z DSt/GOST電磁相容標準提供EMC符合性證據。相關O'z DSt或GOST標準通常派生自IEC 61000/CISPR系列。技術文件應覆蓋與併網逆變器使用相關的發射、抗擾度、安裝條件、佈線、濾波器和運行模式。

standards_or_laws: O'z DSt / GOST EMC standards for electrical equipment (IEC 61000 / CISPR series-derived)
O'zstandart mandatory conformity certification technical-file requirements for EMC-relevant products
IEC 62109 EMC provisions where referenced by O'zstandart or project specifications

summary.en: China-side packages often include GB/T 37408-2021, GB/T 19964-2024, and EMC test evidence generated for IEC/CISPR or other export markets. Those reports may help build an O'zstandart technical file but must be checked against the O'z DSt / GOST EMC standards required by the Uzbekistan conformity body and whether test conditions, model scope, and firmware version are consistent.
summary.zh: 中国侧资料包通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、GB/T 19964-2024以及面向IEC/CISPR或其他出口市场形成的EMC测试证据。这些报告可帮助建立O'zstandart技术文件，但须按乌兹别克斯坦符合性机构要求的O'z DSt/GOST EMC标准进行核对，并确认测试条件、型号范围和固件版本是否一致。
summary.zht: 中國側資料包通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、GB/T 19964-2024以及面向IEC/CISPR或其他出口市場形成的EMC測試證據。這些報告可幫助建立O'zstandart技術文件，但須按烏茲別克斯坦符合性機構要求的O'z DSt/GOST EMC標準進行核對，並確認測試條件、型號範圍和韌體版本是否一致。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 11 / IEC 61000 series test evidence where available

gap.en: The practical gap is not only test limits. The O'zstandart file must match the exact model, firmware, filters, manuals, and intended installation. EMC reports prepared for China or another export market may need delta review, standard-mapping, or retesting against O'z DSt / GOST requirements specified by the accredited Uzbekistan conformity body.
gap.zh: 实际差距不只是测试限值。O'zstandart文件必须匹配具体型号、固件、滤波器、说明书和预期安装方式。为中国或其他出口市场准备的EMC报告可能需要差异审查、标准映射，或按经认可的乌兹别克斯坦符合性机构指定的O'z DSt/GOST要求重新测试。
gap.zht: 實際差距不只是測試限值。O'zstandart文件必須匹配具體型號、韌體、濾波器、說明書和預期安裝方式。為中國或其他出口市場準備的EMC報告可能需要差異審查、標準映射，或按經認可的烏茲別克斯坦符合性機構指定的O'z DSt/GOST要求重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as part of O'zstandart conformity certification where EMC requirements apply to the inverter product scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific only to the extent required by Chinese grid, EMC, or purchaser specifications; not equivalent to Uzbekistan O'z DSt / GOST EMC conformity

source.publisher: Agency for Technical Regulation (O'zstandart), Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC reports from China or other markets should be treated as input evidence, not as automatic O'z DSt / GOST EMC compliance for Uzbekistan O'zstandart certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 来自中国或其他市场的EMC报告应作为输入证据，而不是乌兹别克斯坦O'zstandart认证中O'z DSt/GOST EMC的自动合规证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 來自中國或其他市場的EMC報告應作為輸入證據，而不是烏茲別克斯坦O'zstandart認證中O'z DSt/GOST EMC的自動合規證明。
